arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca compares Moises Caicedo to Rodri and Declan Rice
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca believes Moises Caicedo has what it takes to compete with some of the best midfielders in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s first signing of 2025/26: Blaugrana close to securing superstar free agent
arts.sum: Out of contract in 2025, Real Madrid and Manchester United have since taken an interest in landing the 28-year-old on a free transfer, but Romano says that Barcelona are clear favourites to secure his signature. Barcelona are close to securing their first new face for the 2025/26 campaign, with Fabrizio Romano announcing that Hansi Flick’s side are nearing a deal to add Jonathan Tah to their ranks.
Hansi Flick explains why he let Vitor Roque leave Barcelona ahead of Real Betis clash - Football España Barcelona plan to sell a defender if Jonathan Tah arrives - Football España

arts.ttl: Barcelona delighted with loanee’s performances as 2025 deal now expected to become easier
arts.sum: Over the last 2-3 years, Barcelona have tried to permanently part ways with Clement Lenglet. However, on each occasion they have failed, and they have instead had to settle for loan deals (to Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa and Atletico Madrid respectively). arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Former Premier League pair to be made available for exit?
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly open to parting ways with two of their former Premier League players during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Saturday's La Liga predictions including Real Betis vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Real Betis vs. Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich target Jonathan Tah close to a deal with FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were at multiple points close to agreeing to a transfer with Bayer Leverkusen for one of their defenders Jonathan Tah. Die Werkself priced Bayern out of the race and the player’s future is uncertain yet again. Barcelona are close to agreeing a deal to sign Jonathan Tah on a free transfer in the summer.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Real Betis: La Liga
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski could return to the starting lineup when Barcelona visits Real Betis in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Chelsea in line to benefit as Barcelona hold 'very satisfactory' transfer meeting with Bundesliga star
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco reportedly meets with the agents of Jonathan Tah to accelerate La Blaugrana's pursuit of the Bayer Leverkusen defender.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool make €40m offer for Barca star with 35 goals & 48 assists; Arne Slot pushing for move
arts.sum: Liverpool’s stellar campaign under new manager Arne Slot has propelled the Reds to the top of the Premier League standings with 35 points, maintaining a comfortable seven-point cushion over second-placed Chelsea.
